free_text: 14.6-MeV Neutron Activation Cross Sections for the
Neutron beam continuously monitored using amplified
signal from 6Li loaded glass scintillator feeding
Cross sections determined by treating irradiation as
allowing for decay from end of each interval to end
Xenon product activities assumed to be from (n,2n).
Iodine product activities assumed to be from (n,p).
No information on source of uncertainties.
Data taken from Table I in reference.
VM:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Large error results from low intensity 110.5-keV
photopeak falling on a compton edge.
